SizePage.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

TotalItems.description: Total number of items matching the request (across all pages).

ReferencePricingTable.description: Shared Key of the PricingTable between ProAbono and your application.

Order.description: Define the position of the PricingTable among all PricingTables when displayed in the hosted pages.

IsVisible.description: Visibility of the PricingTable in hosted pages.

IsDefault.description: Indicate if the PricingTable is displayed by default in hosted pages.

Links.description: Useful links concerning the Pricing Table.
